domain: Welsh eisteddfod chair-ceremony (Wales, 9th c onward; National Eisteddfod from 1861; bardic competition; 7-stage promotion ladder englyn-cywydd-awdl-cynghanedd-preliminary-committee-chair; pen-bardd master-disciple lineage; cynghanedd consonant-pattern constraint; public adjudicator unanimity)
specific_mechanism: EISTEDDFOD-7-STAGE-CHAIR-FILTER: 7-stage curriculum filter pipeline {englyn, cywydd, awdl, cynghanedd, prelim-judge, committee-adjudication, chair-bestowal} + public-adjudicator vote V_audience as stage-gate threshold + pen-bardd master-checkpoint to disgybl-student weight-delta transfer M_delta + cynghanedd consonant-pattern hard constraint C_cyng + chair-unanimity acceptance threshold T_chair=1.0.
llm_application: EISTEDDFOD-CHAIR LLM training-method: 7-stage curriculum filter Pipeline_7 with public-adjudicator-vote stage-gate V_audience threshold sigma_gate=0.7 + pen-bardd master-checkpoint -> disgybl-student weight-delta transfer M_delta + cynghanedd consonant-pattern hard constraint C_cyng as auxiliary loss + chair-bestowal unanimity acceptance T_chair=1.0 only at final stage. Differs from DAGGER, POCL, RLHF, GRPO, Chain-of-Distillation by 7-stage public-adjudicator-vote gates + cynghanedd consonant constraint + unanimity-only final acceptance. Differs from R571 SPARTAN-AGOGE 3-age-class.
novelty_claim: Curriculum + DPO + KD + RLHF + reject-sample cover staged training + adjudication. EISTEDDFOD adds (a) 7-stage filter Pipeline_7 + (b) public-adjudicator-vote stage-gate V_audience + (c) cynghanedd consonant hard constraint + (d) unanimity chair-bestowal T_chair=1.0. Recombination — borderline lookup. K_sub_mechanisms=4.
